tests.title: should verify welcome hero header is displayed
tests.fullTitle: Extended E2E Web Tests should verify welcome hero header is displayed
tests.code:
const welcomeText = await driver.findElement(By.css('.welcome-hero h2')).getAttribute('textContent');
expect(welcomeText).to.include('Welcome');

tests.title: should verify action grid cards are present
tests.fullTitle: Extended E2E Web Tests should verify action grid cards are present
tests.code:
const cards = await driver.findElements(By.css('.action-card'));
expect(cards.length).to.equal(4);

tests.title: should check sidebar footer contains logged-in username
tests.fullTitle: Extended E2E Web Tests should check sidebar footer contains logged-in username
tests.code:
const footerName = await driver.findElement(By.xpath('//div[contains(@class, "sidebar-footer")]//div[contains(@style, "font-weight: 600")]')).getAttribute('textContent');
expect(footerName).to.equal('Lokesh');
